name: CyberWorld Survival
description: Survive 10 nodes, collect resources, and reach the exfil point!
instructions: Use arrow keys to move. Make smart choices to survive each node.

name: Glitch Snake
description: Classic snake with a cyber twist!
instructions: Use arrow keys to control the snake. Eat to grow, avoid walls and yourself.

name: Hex Breaker
instructions: Move paddle with mouse or touch. Bounce the ball to break blocks.

name: Wire Runner
description: Endless runner in a neon cyber world!
instructions: Press space or tap to jump. Dodge obstacles and go for distance!
